title: `$fatal` leads to coredump and should not be affected by `+verilator+error+limit`

features.name: fatal triggers final block via implicit finish
features.description: Code should include a $fatal call followed by a final block that should execute when $fatal implicitly calls $finish per LRM 20.10

features.name: fatal override of error limit flag
features.description: Code should include a $fatal call that should not be affected by +verilator+error+limit command-line override
